label: Skin pigmentation & photo-response
description: Reviewed, frozen list of EFO/OBA/MONDO root traits pulled WITH child traits from the NHGRI-EBI GWAS Catalog download endpoint. Each root names an umbrella concept (its leaf traits come along via includeChildTraits=true), so this is a small auditable list, not a hardcoded gene list. Edit `roots` to change what is queried; the pull then fails loud if a new mapped trait appears under a root that has not been reviewed. Roots were discovered 2026-06-25 by enumerating which trait nodes carry data and confirming each is on-axis. Notes carry that day's association-row counts as a sanity baseline.

EFO_0021835.label: melanin measurement
EFO_0021835.note: marginal ~1; mostly rolls up under skin pigmentation
